summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BIG Hat Trivia Scoreboard after successful retheme from Phoenix Suns to cyber-futuristic Instagram gradient design. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend successfully implements the new playful cyber theme with excellent visual consistency and full functional integrity.
passed_tests: Backend root API endpoint (200 OK)
SharePoint files fetch API (6 files returned with 12+ second wait time)
SharePoint sync API (successful data sync)
Get synced scores API (data retrieval working)
Venue-specific scores API (working)
Presets CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Tournaments CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, advance)
Dashboard loads with dark cyber theme (#0A0A12 background)
Cyber-grid background pattern rendering correctly
Header displays 'BIG HAT GRAPHICS' with gradient glow text effect
SharePoint fetch button populates file picker with 6 files
File selection renders leaderboard with IG-gradient top 3 cards
Top 3 cards have correct accent colors (gold 1st, pink 2nd, purple 3rd)
Leaderboard displays team names, scores, and round breakdowns
Mode switching between Leaderboard and Tournament works seamlessly
Tournament setup with team name input dialog functional
Tournament bracket generation with color-coded round labels
Bracket renders with gradient connector lines and glass panel cards
Tournament result recording (team advancement) working
Aspect ratio toggle (16:9 ↔ 9:16) with correct preview updates
Animation controls (replay, pause/play, speed slider) functional
Export buttons (PNG, Video, Live View) all enabled and clickable
Preset save/load/delete functionality with success notifications
Instagram gradient colors properly implemented (yellow/orange/pink/magenta/purple)
Cyber-futuristic fonts applied (Orbitron headers, DM Sans body, JetBrains Mono scores)
Dark theme consistency - no bright/white backgrounds leaking
Cyber cityscape backdrop with IG gradient sky (replaces desert theme)
Glass panel UI elements with proper transparency and neon glow effects
Responsive layout with proper cyber-themed styling throughout
